title: Slovenia — Application for Vehicle Registration
description: Slovenia's "Vloga za registracijo vozila" (Application for Vehicle Registration), specified as Annex II of the Pravilnik o registraciji motornih in priklopnih vozil (Rules on the Registration of Motor and Trailer Vehicles) and distributed as a static specimen from the eUprava (e-Administration) portal's vehicle-registration page. Vehicle registration in Slovenia is carried out at a registracijska organizacija (registration organization, typically an authorized garage or the AMZS), not a single national motor-vehicle agency; the form itself is agency-agnostic and names only a blank header line for whichever organization processes it. Covers the vehicle user's and owner's identity and address, a free-text procedure description, the vehicle's brand, commercial designation, and VIN, an attachments checklist, and — via three page-2 declaration blocks the form itself bundles into the same specimen — an owner/user declaration of the reason for a plate/permit replacement or de-registration, an ownership-change declaration (previous owner's identity, address, and the date of change), a declaration of the current location of a de-registered vehicle, and a free-text description of any other change to the vehicle's registered data. Opens Slovenia's DMV vertical (5 of 6, alongside Passport/GOV-2927, National ID/GOV-2928, Business Formation/GOV-2910, Taxes/GOV-2929, and Visa/GOV-3249). Excludes the form's own registration-organization header line and entry-number box (both office-assigned/pre-printed, not applicant data), the entire "IZPOLNI REGISTRACIJSKA ORGANIZACIJA" (to be completed by the registration organization) block on page 1 (remarks, office place/date, official's name, stamp), and both officials' identity-verification/signature lines on page 2's ownership-change block, consistent with this registry's convention of excluding office-only sections. Physical signature lines (owner/user, previous owner) are excluded as wet-ink marks, consistent with this registry's established treatment of signature lines on print-and-fill government forms; no signature-adjacent date exists separately from the already-modelled `placeAndDateOfApplication`/`ownershipChangeDate` fields on this form. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Slovenia or any Slovenian registration organization.

authority.name: Registracijska organizacija (per the Pravilnik o registraciji motornih in priklopnih vozil, under the Ministrstvo za infrastrukturo)

source.documentRef: "Vloga za registracijo vozila" (Application for Vehicle Registration), Annex II of the Pravilnik o registraciji motornih in priklopnih vozil, distributed as a static PDF specimen from eUprava's vehicle-registration page. A companion editable .docx of the same specimen (byte-for-byte matching text) is served at the same host, file=19579, and was used to cross-check field ordering and labels.

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-3246, authored under child issue GOV-3248. Independently re-fetched, sha256-verified, and extracted from scratch (pdfjs-dist text layer plus a node-canvas high-resolution render to confirm the unlabelled 'Postopek' procedure box carries no printed checkbox options). See this schema's own VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record.

fields.name: existingVehicleRegistrationMark
fields.label: (A) registrska oznaka vozila
fields.description: The vehicle's existing registration mark (plate number), where the vehicle is already registered and the procedure concerns a change, transfer, or de-registration rather than a brand-new first registration.

fields.name: vehicleUserName
fields.label: (C1.1 / C1.2) Priimek in ime – naziv
fields.description: The surname and first name of the vehicle's user (natural person), or the company name (legal person), under section (C1) Uporabnik vozila (User of the vehicle).
fields.sourceRef: (C1) Uporabnik vozila — (C1.1 / C1.2) Priimek in ime – naziv

fields.name: vehicleUserIdNumber
fields.label: EMŠO / MŠ
fields.description: The vehicle user's EMŠO (unique personal identification number, for a natural person) or MŠ (business registration number, for a legal person).

fields.name: vehicleUserAddress
fields.label: (C1.3) Stalno ali začasno prebivališče – sedež
fields.description: The vehicle user's permanent or temporary residence (natural person) or registered seat (legal person).
fields.sourceRef: (C1) Uporabnik vozila — (C1.3) Stalno ali začasno prebivališče – sedež

fields.name: vehicleOwnerName
fields.label: (C2.1 / C2.2) Priimek in ime – naziv
fields.description: The surname and first name of the vehicle's owner (natural person), or the company name (legal person), under section (C2) Lastnik vozila (Owner of the vehicle). Distinct from the vehicle user when the two differ (e.g. a company-owned vehicle used by an employee).
fields.sourceRef: (C2) Lastnik vozila — (C2.1 / C2.2) Priimek in ime – naziv

fields.name: vehicleOwnerIdNumber
fields.label: EMŠO / MŠ
fields.description: The vehicle owner's EMŠO (unique personal identification number, for a natural person) or MŠ (business registration number, for a legal person).

fields.name: vehicleOwnerAddress
fields.label: (C2.3) Stalno ali začasno prebivališče – sedež
fields.description: The vehicle owner's permanent or temporary residence (natural person) or registered seat (legal person).
fields.sourceRef: (C2) Lastnik vozila — (C2.3) Stalno ali začasno prebivališče – sedež

fields.name: procedureDescription
fields.label: Postopek
fields.description: A free-text description of the procedure being requested (e.g. first registration, ownership transfer, re-registration, de-registration). The form prints only the "Postopek:" label followed by a blank box, with no enumerated checkbox options — confirmed via a node-canvas high-resolution render of this exact region, which shows no printed text inside the box. Modelled as free-form string, not `type: "enum"`, since the source itself provides no closed vocabulary to cite.

fields.name: vehicleBrand
fields.label: (D1) Znamka
fields.description: The vehicle's brand/make.

fields.name: vehicleCommercialDesignation
fields.label: (D.3) Komercialna oznaka
fields.description: The vehicle's commercial designation (model name/variant).

fields.name: vehicleIdentificationNumber
fields.label: (E) Identifikacijska številka vozila (VIN)
fields.description: The vehicle's identification number (VIN).

fields.name: attachmentPlatesEnclosed
fields.label: Registrske tablice
fields.description: Whether the vehicle's registration plates are enclosed with this application (e.g. for a de-registration or plate replacement).

fields.name: attachmentTrafficPermitEnclosed
fields.label: Prometno dovoljenje
fields.description: Whether the vehicle's traffic permit (registration certificate) is enclosed with this application.

fields.name: attachmentProofOfOwnershipEnclosed
fields.label: Dokazilo o lastništvu
fields.description: Whether proof of ownership is enclosed with this application.

fields.name: attachmentDestructionCertificateEnclosed
fields.label: Potrdilo o uničenju vozila
fields.description: Whether a vehicle destruction certificate is enclosed with this application (for a de-registration due to scrapping).

fields.name: attachmentInsuranceContractEnclosed
fields.label: Zavarovalna pogodba
fields.description: Whether an insurance contract is enclosed with this application.

fields.name: otherDocumentsDescription
fields.label: Drugi dokumenti
fields.description: A free-text description of any other documents enclosed with this application, beyond the five named attachment categories.

fields.name: placeAndDateOfApplication
fields.label: Kraj in datum
fields.description: The place and date where the application is being completed.

fields.name: reasonForReplacementOrDeregistration
fields.label: Izjava o razlogih za zamenjavo registrskih tablic ali prometnega dovoljenja oziroma za odjavo vozila
fields.description: The owner/user's free-text declaration of the reasons for a plate or traffic-permit replacement, or for de-registering the vehicle. Applicable only when the procedure is one of these three; left blank for a first registration or ownership transfer.
fields.sourceRef: IZJAVA LASTNIKA / UPORABNIKA VOZILA — Izjava o razlogih za zamenjavo registrskih tablic ali prometnega dovoljenja oziroma za odjavo vozila

fields.name: ownershipChangeDate
fields.label: Datum spremembe lastništva
fields.description: The date the vehicle's ownership changed. Applicable only when the procedure is an ownership transfer.
fields.sourceRef: SPREMEMBA LASTNIŠTVA VOZILA — Datum spremembe lastništva

fields.name: previousOwnerIdNumber
fields.label: EMŠO / MŠ starega lastnika vozila
fields.description: The previous owner's EMŠO (natural person) or MŠ (legal person). Applicable only when the procedure is an ownership transfer.
fields.sourceRef: SPREMEMBA LASTNIŠTVA VOZILA — EMŠO / MŠ starega lastnika vozila

fields.name: previousOwnerName
fields.label: Priimek in ime – naziv starega lastnika vozila
fields.description: The previous owner's surname and first name (natural person) or company name (legal person). Applicable only when the procedure is an ownership transfer.
fields.sourceRef: SPREMEMBA LASTNIŠTVA VOZILA — Priimek in ime – naziv starega lastnika vozila

fields.name: previousOwnerAddress
fields.label: Naslov starega lastnika vozila
fields.description: The previous owner's address. Applicable only when the procedure is an ownership transfer.
fields.sourceRef: SPREMEMBA LASTNIŠTVA VOZILA — Naslov starega lastnika vozila

fields.name: deregisteredVehicleLocationAddress
fields.label: Odjavljeno vozilo se nahaja na naslovu
fields.description: The address where a de-registered vehicle is currently located. Applicable only when the procedure is a de-registration, or a subsequent notification of the de-registered vehicle's location.
fields.sourceRef: IZJAVA O LOKACIJI OZIROMA SPREMEMBI LOKACIJE ODJAVLJENEGA VOZILA — Odjavljeno vozilo se nahaja na naslovu

fields.name: vehicleDataChangeDescription
fields.label: Opis
fields.description: A free-text description of a change to the vehicle's registered data (other than an ownership change), e.g. a technical modification or a correction to a previously registered detail.

documents.label: Declaration that the information provided in the application is accurate
documents.statement: V skladu z določbo zakona, ki ureja splošni upravni postopek, opozorjen na kazensko in materialno odgovornost, s svojim podpisom potrjujem resničnost podanih izjav v tej vlogi! (In accordance with the provision of the act governing general administrative procedure, having been warned of criminal and material liability, I confirm with my signature the truthfulness of the statements made in this application!)
documents.sourceRef: IZJAVA LASTNIKA / UPORABNIKA VOZILA (page 2, above the owner/user signature line)
